changeSet.author: ogc-285

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.label_preset_field WHERE preset_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.label_preset WHERE is_system = true)

changeSet.comment: Seed LAB_NUMBER (required, position 1) for each system preset
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.label_preset_field (id, preset_id, field_key, source_type, is_required, display_order, last_updated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.label_preset_field_seq'), id, 'LAB_NUMBER', 'SYSTEM', true, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM clinlims.label_preset WHERE is_system = true;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.label_preset_field WHERE preset_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.label_preset WHERE is_system = true);
